'''tazhuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamelin|enamelin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamelin|enamelin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazhuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzhiyith|tæzhiyith]] || [[word:tæzhiyij|tæzhiyij]] || [[word:tæzhiyish|tæzhiyish]] || [[word:tæzhiyi|tæzhiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhuzhuyuth|tazhuzhuyuth]] || [[word:tazhuzhuyuj|tazhuzhuyuj]] || [[word:tazhuzhuyush|tazhuzhuyush]] || [[word:tazhuzhuyu|tazhuzhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhuyuth|tazhuyuth]] || [[word:tazhuyuj|tazhuyuj]] || [[word:tazhuyush|tazhuyush]] || [[word:tazhuyu|tazhuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhufyuth|tazhufyuth]] || [[word:tazhufyuj|tazhufyuj]] || [[word:tazhufyush|tazhufyush]] || [[word:tazhufyuf|tazhufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazhuyuthu|tazhuyuthu]] || [[word:tazhuyuju|tazhuyuju]] || [[word:tazhuyushu|tazhuyushu]] || [[word:tazhuyuku|tazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazhuyuth|tazhuyuth]] || [[word:tazhuyuj|tazhuyuj]] || [[word:tazhuyush|tazhuyush]] || [[word:tazhuyu|tazhuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazhuyuthul|tazhuyuthul]] || [[word:tazhuyujul|tazhuyujul]] || [[word:tazhuyushul|tazhuyushul]] || [[word:tazhuyukul|tazhuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazhuyuthuthu|tazhuyuthuthu]] || [[word:tazhuyujuju|tazhuyujuju]] || [[word:tazhuyushushu|tazhuyushushu]] || [[word:tazhuyuku|tazhuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazhuyuthun|tazhuyuthun]] || [[word:tazhuyujun|tazhuyujun]] || [[word:tazhuyushun|tazhuyushun]] || [[word:tazhuyukun|tazhuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazhuyuthuoro|tazhuyuthuoro]] || [[word:tazhuyujuoro|tazhuyujuoro]] || [[word:tazhuyushuoro|tazhuyushuoro]] || [[word:tazhuyukuoro|tazhuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
